title: Galaxy Sync Protocol v2
requirements: P2P state discovery across regional shards (MENA/Global).
Conflict resolution using 'Sovereign Priority' (Egypt-soil nodes take precedence).
Compliance: Law 151 data residency enforcement during P2P exchange.

logic.negotiation: Merkle-tree hash comparison for state drift detection.
logic.resolution: Atomic patch propagation to lagging shards.

compliance.residency: Block cross-border movement of Law 151 PII shards.
